items.summary: Update the backend member registration logic to generate a unique member ID in the format 'RI' followed by a zero-padded 9-digit sequential number (e.g., RI 001920001). Store this formatted ID as part of the member record and return it upon successful registration.

Create a dedicated Member Joining Form page (or update the existing RegisterPage) that collects name, mobile number, email, and optional sponsor ID. On successful submission, display the newly generated unique member ID (e.g., RI 001920001) to the user. The form must validate all required fields before submission.

Ensure that upon successful member registration, the new member is immediately visible in the Admin Dashboard (AdminPanel) member list without requiring a manual refresh. The admin table must display the newly generated unique member ID (RI format) as a column.
